title: DEAI Healthy Ageing India LASI Wave 1
subtitle: Derived outputs for DEAI ecological validation in India
description: This dataset contains the public release for the manuscript 'Development and ecological validation of a digital exposome ageing index for healthy ageing surveillance in India using LASI Wave 1'. It includes processed state-level tables, publication figures, manuscript assets, and reproducibility materials derived from publicly available aggregate sources. DEAI is an ecological surveillance index and should not be interpreted as an individual-level biological-age or clinical risk score.
